title: marsdenia neriifolia
intro: Marsdenia neriifolia, also known as the yellow vine or yellow snake vine, is a perennial plant native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, Marsdenia neriifolia has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Marsdenia neriifolia can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
